name: Super Squash
short_description: Super Squash is a top-down Shoot 'Em Up arcade game which features multiple playable characters who must all unite together to stop the unrelenting hordes of enemies and bosses.
detailed_description:
Super Squash's gameplay consists of destroying enemies, collecting coins and unleashing your ultimate abilities on your foes. Super Squash currently includes up to 8 playable characters with unique designs and abilities. The level design of Super Squash also shifts as you blast your way through hordes of minions, allowing for an ever changing experience.

Every universe under Barlock Games has been invaded by a powerful and massive being. Heroes throughout the universe must now band together and stop the evildoer before it is too late! Every hero, enemy, and location from Barlock Games are featured in Super Squash as a 10+ year anniversary celebration of Barlock Games.

  • 15 Levels and 5 Worlds:

    Take part in the massive variety of environments in Super Squash. From forests, caves and lava lakes, to mansions and battlegrounds on VERY large furniture; there are plenty of areas to battle it out on!

  •  4 Modes:

    Jump straight into the Story Mode and if that's not fancy enough for you, choose through the other modes such as Free Mode, Blitz Mode and Squash Mode! All of which feature either random selected characters/levels or the ability to choose who and where you'd like to squash your foes!

  • 28 Enemies and 7 Bosses:

    Super Squash offers a great and random selection of enemies & bosses. You never know what you might find on this wacky and unique journey!

  • 8 Playable Characters:

    Want variety? Each character in Super Squash offers a different playstyle and a unique design.

  • SquashPedia:

    This will help you learn the ins and outs of Super Squash. Including information and origins regarding Characters, Enemies, Bosses, and Locations. As you play through the game you will uncover more of these notes, helping you along your journey.

  • 30 Steam Achievements:

    From complex to quite simple tasks, Super Squash features plenty of achievements to earn!
